fields.localRole: Backward-compatible relationship linkage using existing inAppPurchasePrices IDs; mutually exclusive with manual_prices.
Each item becomes an inline inAppPurchasePrices resource linked to the selected IAP and price point, with optional startDate and endDate attributes; mutually exclusive with manual_price_ids.
Set true after Apple creates the price schedule.

tools.note: The preferred manual_prices array maps to Apple inline manual price resources with price-point relationships and optional dates. The legacy manual_price_ids linkage remains supported when manual_prices is absent; the two forms are rejected together.

inputs.localRole: Use the reserved image ID returned by Apple as the commit path ID.
Use the reserved image ID returned by Apple as the commit resource ID.
Use the MD5 checksum produced while uploading the local file through Apple's presigned operations.

operations.condition: After PATCH returns a nonterminal image state, or when the PATCH response is ambiguous, reconcile and poll the reserved image by ID until processing reaches a terminal state or local verification stops.

inputs.localRole: Inspect the exact image created by the reservation operation.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: The public tool returns its stable base projection instead of arbitrary relationship expansion; dedicated commerce tools cover related resources.

operations.condition: Before any commit PATCH is attempted, best-effort delete a confirmed reservation when cancellation, a missing upload plan, byte-transfer failure, or commit-body preparation prevents commit; treat 404 as already absent.

inputs.localRole: Rollback only the known reservation for this upload attempt.

fields.localRole: Creates an immutable temporary snapshot before reserve, then derives fileName/fileSize, supplies binary upload bytes, and drives the commit checksum from that same snapshot.

tools.note: The handler uses the non-deprecated product-scoped image resource documented by Apple 4.4.1 and snapshots the file before reserve; binary upload through Apple's signed operations remains external to OpenAPI. PREPARE_FOR_SUBMISSION, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, APPROVED, and REJECTED mean upload processing is complete; FAILED is terminal failure; AWAITING_UPLOAD, UPLOAD_COMPLETE, missing, and unknown states remain pending and are polled with conditional GET. After a confirmed 2xx commit, nonterminal processing is an accepted success with uploadCommitted=true, processingComplete=false, deliveryPending=true, and retrySafe=false. If PATCH transport remains ambiguous and reconciliation only shows pending, the outcome stays an error; either way the image is retained with inspection guidance. A mismatched 2xx commit resource triggers one GET of the expected image ID; valid terminal or pending state is interpreted normally, while invalid reconciliation stays an error. A confirmed reservation that fails before PATCH is best-effort deleted independently of cancellation; an unresolved create response instead requires parent-collection inspection because Apple exposes no idempotency key for locating that exact reservation.

inputs.localRole: Use the reserved screenshot ID returned by Apple as the commit path ID.
Use the reserved screenshot ID returned by Apple as the commit resource ID.
Use the MD5 checksum produced while uploading the local file through Apple's presigned operations.

operations.condition: After PATCH returns a nonterminal delivery state, or when the PATCH response is ambiguous, reconcile and poll the reserved review screenshot by ID until processing reaches a terminal state or local verification stops.

inputs.localRole: Inspect the exact review screenshot created by the reservation operation.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: The public tool returns its stable base projection instead of arbitrary relationship expansion; dedicated commerce tools cover related resources.

operations.condition: Before any commit PATCH is attempted, best-effort delete a confirmed reservation when cancellation, a missing upload plan, byte-transfer failure, or commit-body preparation prevents commit; treat 404 as already absent.

inputs.localRole: Rollback only the known reservation for this upload attempt.

fields.localRole: Creates an immutable temporary snapshot before reserve, then derives reserve metadata, supplies binary upload bytes, and drives the commit checksum from that same snapshot.

tools.note: The handler snapshots the file before reserve; binary transfer through Apple's signed operations is a local/external step. COMPLETE is successful; FAILED is terminal failure; any other assetDeliveryState remains pending and is polled with conditional GET. After a confirmed 2xx commit, nonterminal processing is an accepted success with uploadCommitted=true, processingComplete=false, deliveryPending=true, and retrySafe=false. If PATCH transport remains ambiguous and reconciliation only shows pending, the outcome stays an error; either way the review screenshot is retained with inspection guidance. A mismatched 2xx commit resource triggers one GET of the expected screenshot ID; valid terminal or pending state is interpreted normally, while invalid reconciliation stays an error. A confirmed reservation that fails before PATCH is best-effort deleted independently of cancellation; an unresolved create response instead requires parent-collection inspection because Apple exposes no idempotency key for locating that exact reservation.
